title: symplocos chinensis subsp. pilosa
intro: Symplocos chinensis subsp. pilosa, also known as the Chinese alder tree, is a deciduous tree species native to China. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Symplocos chinensis subsp. pilosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
